rationale: License revenue cannot be recognized standalone — a related Implementation Service line is required so the performance obligation is identifiable.
Single-line hardware orders above 50 units must be split into separate lines to support per-unit revenue allocation.
Subscription start date must be at or after phase 1 for ratable monthly recognition; phase 0 / pre-go-live is not allowed.
Service revenue is recognized over the delivery period — verify the engagement window matches the deal schedule.
